summary: The diff does not provide evidence that the required backend admin login/session behavior was implemented. It adds a migration module that appears to remove admin password state (contrary to the upgrade persistence requirement) and includes unrelated metadata updates.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix backend admin authentication so `adminLogin(password)` trims whitespace, accepts exactly `JATINSHARMA2580`, returns a non-empty token on success, and returns an explicit invalid-password variant on failure.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided `backend/main.mo` diff is truncated and does not show any `adminLogin` implementation, password comparison/trim logic, token issuance, or explicit invalid-password result variant.

missing_requirements.requirement: Expose/ensure `adminLogin(password)` and `validateAdminSession(token)` behave consistently with refresh-on-validate and expiry removal.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows an `adminSessionTokens` map and a `sessionTimeout` constant, but the truncated `backend/main.mo` does not show `validateAdminSession` (or how tokens are issued, validated, refreshed, or expired/removed).

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure admin password persists correctly across upgrades and is set to `JATINSHARMA2580` after upgrade without wiping other state.
missing_requirements.reason: The added migration explicitly returns `{}` and comments that it will "Remove obsolete admin password state", which conflicts with preserving/setting the admin password to the required value across upgrades. No other upgrade logic ensuring the password is set to `JATINSHARMA2580` is shown in the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify admin login flow works end-to-end in the UI with the specified exact error strings and correct localStorage token behavior using existing `AdminLoginCard` + `useAdminSession`.
missing_requirements.reason: No actual frontend source diffs for `AdminLoginCard`/`useAdminSession` or error message handling are included. The only frontend-related artifact shown is a generated `frontend-file-summaries.txt`, which is not evidence of implemented UI behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration that removes/clears stored admin password state during upgrade.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; REQ-3 requires preserving and ensuring the admin password is set to `JATINSHARMA2580` after upgrade, not removing the password state.

hallucinated_features.description: Project metadata/state tracking file update listing feature requests as pending.
hallucinated_features.reason: `project_state.json` changes are not part of the requested backend/admin-auth fix requirements and do not contribute to the specified acceptance criteria.
